/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/tools/logger/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/tools/texture_generator/generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/window/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/gameplay/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/renderer/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/renderer/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/renderer/crosshair.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/gameplay/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/world/chunk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/world/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/renderer/selection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/network/enet_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/network/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/network/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/network/network_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/renderer/text_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Stonecraft.dir/engine/gameplay/menu.cpp.o -o Stonecraft  -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
